title: The Impostor
description: Find the one odd emoji. First correct player wins the bonus. A wrong guess locks that player out for the round.

title: Emoji Math Speedrun
description: Solve the emoji equations and submit the value of the target emoji. First correct answer wins the bonus. A wrong answer locks that player out for the round.

title: The Mirror Sprint
description: Read the mirrored word and type it forwards. First correct answer wins the bonus. A wrong answer locks that player out for the round.
